welcomeTitle: A structured control room for AqarInn operations.
welcomeDescription: This starter keeps auth, permissions, APIs, and localization organized before business modules arrive.

foundationCardOne.title: Permissions-first
foundationCardOne.description: Route, section, tab, and action access are prepared from day one.

foundationCardTwo.title: Localization-first
foundationCardTwo.description: Arabic and English with RTL and LTR support are already wired.

loginDescription: Authentication screens are placeholders only. Connect your external backend APIs later.
frontendOnlyHint: This starter is frontend-only. No local auth workflow or backend logic is implemented in the app.
forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link.
resetPasswordDescription: Enter your new password to complete the reset.
loginFailed: Sign in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
logoutErrorFallback: Signed out locally. Some cleanup failed on the server.
logoutFailed: Sign out encountered an error. You have been signed out locally.
forgotPasswordSuccessDescription: Check your inbox for the password reset link.
forgotPasswordFailed: Could not send the reset email. Please try again.
resetPasswordSuccessDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPasswordFailed: Could not reset the password. Please try again.
resetPasswordEmailMissing: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new reset email.
emailTooLong: Email must be 100 characters or less.
passwordTooLong: Password must be 50 characters or less.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
passwordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
passwordNumber: Password must include at least one number.
passwordSymbol: Password must include at least one symbol.
